title: [Blueprint] Master blueprint paperwork — paperwork before code
description: Pre-code blueprint epic. Sub-beads GW-1.1 through GW-1.11 author the full 000-docs/blueprint/ paperwork set (master blueprint, business case, PRD, architecture, diagram, user journeys, roadmap, cowork curriculum, beads linkage, testing policy, observability spec) PLUS GW-1.8 (staffed 11-auditor panel) and GW-1.9 (audit response + blueprint v1.0 sign-off). E1 (GW-E1) cannot start until this epic closes. Blueprint: 000-docs/blueprint/00-MASTER-BLUEPRINT.md.

title: [Phase 0] Provision Guidewire Cloud sandbox tenant
description: Hard prereq for the entire project. Without sandbox access, neither the staffed audit panel nor E1 can begin (NO MOCKS rule). Establish SOPS-encrypted sandbox creds (runbook/secrets.prod.sops.yaml), capture initial replay recordings, document tenant ID + LOB / typelist surface in 000-docs/blueprint/05-TECHNICAL-SPEC.md. If sandbox is unobtainable, scope pivots to a vendor-partner integration where API access exists — never to mocks. Blueprint: 000-docs/blueprint/05-TECHNICAL-SPEC.md (NO MOCKS section).

title: [E4] Customer profile template + cowork fork starter
description: MVP epic 4. profiles/_template/ with full mapping set: auth, roles, LOB mappings, typelists, custom entities, field aliases, approval matrix, PII policy. Plus templates/cowork-fork-starter/ with 'pnpm guidewire init <domain>' script that scaffolds renamed copy for cowork audience (flatbed-mcp, mls-mcp, floor-mcp examples). First fork example: Jeremy's flatbed-mcp. Blueprint: 000-docs/blueprint/07-ROADMAP.md § E4 + 08-COWORK-CURRICULUM.md.

title: [E2] PolicyCenter MCP (read-only) — 5-7 carrier-vocabulary tools
description: MVP epic 2. ONE MCP server: servers/policycenter-mcp/. Read-only tools using carrier-vocabulary names (NOT API verbs): find-submissions-waiting-on-me, whats-our-appetite-on-this-risk, show-policies-for-this-insured, summarize-this-submission, did-we-lose-this-account, explain-why-this-got-referred. Drives against real Guidewire Cloud sandbox via tests/recordings/ replay. Drafting tools (draft-referral-note) ship in E5. Blueprint: 000-docs/blueprint/07-ROADMAP.md § E2 + 02-PRD.md § Epic 2.

title: [E1] Foundation — mcp-runtime, schemas, auth, audit, client-sdk, observability
description: MVP epic 1. Foundational packages: mcp-runtime (transport + SDK wrap), schemas (Zod), auth (Guidewire Hub OAuth + JWT propagation), audit (hash-chain Postgres), client-sdk (renamed from adapter-sdk to drop adapter baggage), observability (OTel + pino + Sentry factory in packages/observability). Includes sub-beads GW-2.1 through GW-2.5: audit-tests classify, install audit-harness, CI/CD GH Actions, hash-pin policies, coverage/mutation baselines. Blueprint: 000-docs/blueprint/07-ROADMAP.md § E1 + 02-PRD.md § Epic 1 + 05-TECHNICAL-SPEC.md (stack).

title: [E3] Harness library + CLI — plan / approve / execute / audit / rollback
description: MVP epic 3. packages/harness/ as library + CLI (NOT an MCP server — recursive). Implements: plan generation, policy gate, human approval flow, execute, hash-chained audit trail, rollback hint, evidence bundle export (JSON). Three execution modes: read_only, draft_only, approved_execute. Hard rule: no audit = no write, no policy decision = no write, no idempotency key = no write. Published as @intentsolutions/guidewire-harness on npm. Blueprint: 000-docs/blueprint/07-ROADMAP.md § E3 + 03-ARCHITECTURE.md (harness layer).

title: [E10] Onboarding + certification CLI — pnpm gw onboard <customer>
description: Buildout epic 10. Customer onboarding CLI: scaffolds profile mappings only (auth, roles, LOB, typelists, custom entities, field aliases, approval matrix, PII policy), runs contract tests against customer sandbox, produces security-review checklist for handoff. Blueprint: 000-docs/blueprint/07-ROADMAP.md § E10.

title: [E9] Producer-side MCP — MGA / broker scope
description: Buildout epic 9. servers/producer-mcp/ for MGA/broker audience: show-my-book-of-business, whats-my-commission-status, find-my-pending-quotes. Answers persona #4's complaint (producer side underrepresented). Blueprint: 000-docs/blueprint/07-ROADMAP.md § E9.

title: [E8] BillingCenter MCP + Payments (separate payments-mcp with dual control)
description: Buildout epic 8. servers/billingcenter-mcp/ read-only first: show-overdue-accounts, whats-the-payment-status, find-billing-issues-for-this-policy, reconcile-this-payment. Payments tools split into separate payments-mcp (dual-control review required, NEVER in OSS demo path). Blueprint: 000-docs/blueprint/07-ROADMAP.md § E8.

title: [E7] ClaimCenter MCP
description: Buildout epic 7. servers/claimcenter-mcp/ with claims-vocabulary tools: find-claims-at-risk-of-leakage, summarize-this-loss, whats-the-reserve-picture, draft-denial-letter. Three-mode design per tool. Blueprint: 000-docs/blueprint/07-ROADMAP.md § E7.

title: [E6] Workflow + Events — webhook receiver, queue, events-mcp (query-only)
description: Buildout epic 6. Event-receiver infra: webhook + BullMQ on Redis (dev) / Cloud Tasks or SQS (prod). Small events-mcp server for query-only / replay access. Integration Gateway triggers move into the relevant suite MCP. Blueprint: 000-docs/blueprint/07-ROADMAP.md § E6 + 03-ARCHITECTURE.md (events plane).

title: [E5] Drafting tools (referral note, endorsement) — first writes
description: Buildout epic 5. Add drafting tools to policycenter-mcp: draft-referral-note, propose-endorsement. Drafts go to harness in draft_only mode — never auto-execute. Human reviews + applies via existing UI. Blueprint: 000-docs/blueprint/07-ROADMAP.md § E5.
